items.briefing:
Australian organisations are facing two notable threats today. The Australian Cyber Security Centre (ACSC) is warning that login credentials for Fortinet firewalls and VPN gateways may have been exposed — if your organisation uses these products, IT teams should check for unauthorised access and consider resetting passwords immediately. Separately, a Cloudflare report highlights that cyberattacks on civil society groups, including Australian organisations, are on the rise, meaning community-focused and not-for-profit bodies should be particularly alert.

**Practical tip:** If your organisation uses Fortinet products, contact your IT provider today to confirm whether you may be affected and whether any passwords need changing.

featured.title: ACSC warns of reported credential exposure affecting Fortinet firewalls and VPN gateways
featured.quote: Critical Fortinet firewall vulnerability affecting Australian organisations requires immediate patching.
